title: GD Codex Cross-Review Manifest
description: Plan 1: manifest-driven input for gd-aggregate-codex-cross-review.py --manifest mode. Defines a batch of review jobs without hardcoding Plan H roles.

target_set_id.description: Stable identifier for this batch (e.g. akb2-master-plus-steps).

queue_job_id.description: Unique stable job id within this manifest.

target_role.description: Semantic role of the review target (e.g. master_plan, step_1). Must not contain spaces, slashes, or dots.

primary_target.description: Repo-relative or absolute path to the file that Codex reviewed.

review_kind.description: Review kind passed to the bridge.

expected_target_hash.description: sha256 of primary_target at submit time. Null if target was missing.

codex_raw_result_path.description: Path to existing raw Codex .result file. Aggregator reads but does not invoke writer. Null if transport failed.

raw_contract.description: Parse contract for the raw result. auto = try v2 first, fallback v1.
